beforeHooks.title: "before all" hook in "AC-03: POST /api/session/join — Session Join"
beforeHooks.fullTitle: AC-03: POST /api/session/join — Session Join "before all" hook in "AC-03: POST /api/session/join — Session Join"
beforeHooks.code:
const res = await createSession("Leader");
sessionCode = res.body.code;

tests.title: should allow a new user to join with valid code
tests.fullTitle: AC-03: POST /api/session/join — Session Join should allow a new user to join with valid code

tests.title: should return leader name in join response
tests.fullTitle: AC-03: POST /api/session/join — Session Join should return leader name in join response
tests.code:
const res = await joinSession("Member2", sessionCode);
expect(res.body.leader).to.equal("Leader");

tests.title: should accept lowercase code and normalize it
tests.fullTitle: AC-03: POST /api/session/join — Session Join should accept lowercase code and normalize it
tests.code:
const res = await joinSession("Member3", sessionCode.toLowerCase());
expect(res.status).to.equal(200);

tests.title: should return 409 for duplicate username in same session

tests.title: should return 400 for username shorter than 2 chars

expect(res.status).to.equal(400);

tests.title: should return session info for valid code

tests.title: should return 404 for invalid session code

expect(res.status).to.equal(404);

tests.title: should include createdAt in session info
tests.fullTitle: AC-04: GET /api/session/:code — Session Info should include createdAt in session info
tests.code:
const res = await request.get(`/api/session/${sessionCode}`);
expect(res.body).to.have.property("createdAt");
